m_26_14.description: Normalize M-26-14 osquery asset inventory results for HWAM/SWAM compliance

description: Normalize M-26-14 osquery asset inventory results — hardware, software, and network queries

script.description: Copy Fleet agent context to host.* fields; set m_26_14 managed/source flags

lowercase.description: Normalize host.name to lowercase for consistent entity resolution (Entity Store keys on host.name; case-sensitive keyword match)

enrich.description: Enrich software docs with authorized software catalog (no-op on hardware/network docs)

script.description: Promote package.publisher and package.category from software catalog enrichment

fingerprint.description: Asset identity fingerprint for deduplication across HWAM/SWAM records

script.description: Map m_26_14.hardware.* and host.os.* to unified asset.* schema
Compute asset.id from best resolution key: serial > agent_id > mac > hostname

fingerprint.description: Deterministic asset.id from resolution key (same device = same ID regardless of source)
Log integrity hash: asset identity + state + ingest time
